passing_score_scale: Percentage (75% passing for all ICC exams)
exam_format: Computer-based at Pearson VUE or ICC testing sites

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE testing centers nationwide. Schedule at home.pearsonvue.com/icc.
Select ICC exams also available at ICC-authorized proctoring sites.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Computer-based exams administered at Pearson VUE testing centers or ICC-authorized sites. No personal reference materials permitted during the exam. Certain ICC exams are open-book (code book allowed) — verify for specific exam. Candidates must present valid photo ID at the testing center.
renewal_options: ICC certifications are valid for 3 years. Renewal requires 45 continuing education units (CEUs) within the 3-year period. CEUs can be earned through ICC-approved courses, seminars, and events. Renew through your ICC member account at iccsafe.org.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies set by ICC; contact ICC or check the candidate handbook for current waiting period and attempt limits per exam.

official_study_resources.title: ICC Certification Exam Study Companions
official_study_resources.notes: ICC publishes official study companions for each exam. Check iccsafe.org for current titles and pricing.

official_study_resources.title: ICC Online Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: ICC offers online practice exams; pricing varies by exam.
